description_long: This house is a large, multi-structure residential property surrounded by landscaped greenery, including several trees and hedges. The main building features a complex, multi-gabled roof with dark shingles and several protruding wings, suggesting a sprawling floor plan. The property is bordered by a long, solid wall on one side and a row of evenly spaced trees or shrubs on another, providing privacy and a sense of enclosure. The front approach includes a wide driveway or paved area leading up to the main entrance, which is accentuated by a covered porch and possibly columns. Windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, with some larger panes and smaller, more traditional windows visible. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, with a focus on comfort, privacy, and curb appeal.
description: A large, multi-winged house with a complex gabled roof, surrounded by landscaped greenery, a driveway, and privacy walls. The design features a mix of traditional and modern elements with asymmetrical windows and a prominent entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and landscaped approach with trees and hedges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long privacy wall, side garden, and the multi-winged structure of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back garden, additional trees, and the complex roof structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the secondary entrance, more greenery, and the continuation of the privacy wall.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, columns, and a prominent main door
